'''fomasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeasticidal|yeasticidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeasticidal|yeasticidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fomasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomasithi|fomasithi]] || [[word:fomasiji|fomasiji]] || [[word:fomasishi|fomasishi]] || [[word:fomasiki|fomasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomasuthuthu|fomasuthuthu]] || [[word:fomasujuju|fomasujuju]] || [[word:fomasushushu|fomasushushu]] || [[word:fomasukuku|fomasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomasuthu|fomasuthu]] || [[word:fomasuju|fomasuju]] || [[word:fomasushu|fomasushu]] || [[word:fomasuku|fomasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomasufthuf|fomasufthuf]] || [[word:fomasufjuf|fomasufjuf]] || [[word:fomasufshuf|fomasufshuf]] || [[word:fomasufkuf|fomasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomasethe|fomasethe]] || [[word:fomaseje|fomaseje]] || [[word:fomaseshe|fomaseshe]] || [[word:fomaseke|fomaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomasothotho|fomasothotho]] || [[word:fomasojojo|fomasojojo]] || [[word:fomasoshosho|fomasoshosho]] || [[word:fomasokoko|fomasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomasotho|fomasotho]] || [[word:fomasojo|fomasojo]] || [[word:fomasosho|fomasosho]] || [[word:fomasoko|fomasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomasofthof|fomasofthof]] || [[word:fomasofjof|fomasofjof]] || [[word:fomasofshof|fomasofshof]] || [[word:fomasofkof|fomasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfthÃŸf|fomasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfjÃŸf|fomasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfshÃŸf|fomasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfkÃŸf|fomasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fomasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fomasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fomasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fomasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfthÃŸf|fomasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfjÃŸf|fomasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfshÃŸf|fomasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfkÃŸf|fomasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfthÃŸf|fomasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfjÃŸf|fomasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfshÃŸf|fomasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomasÃŸfkÃŸf|fomasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomasÃḊthÃḊ|fomasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fomasÃḊjÃḊ|fomasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fomasÃḊshÃḊ|fomasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fomasÃḊkÃḊ|fomasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomasathatha|fomasathatha]] || [[word:fomasajaja|fomasajaja]] || [[word:fomasashasha|fomasashasha]] || [[word:fomasakaka|fomasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomasatha|fomasatha]] || [[word:fomasaja|fomasaja]] || [[word:fomasasha|fomasasha]] || [[word:fomasaka|fomasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomasafthaf|fomasafthaf]] || [[word:fomasafjaf|fomasafjaf]] || [[word:fomasafshaf|fomasafshaf]] || [[word:fomasafkaf|fomasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fomasasha|fomasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fomashÃḋsha|fomashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fomasrosha|fomasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fomasmusha|fomasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fomasyasha|fomasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofomasnkshÃḋsha|gofomasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofomasnkrosha|gofomasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofomasnkmusha|gofomasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofomasnkyasha|gofomasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fomamasasha|fomamasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fomamashÃḋsha|fomamashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fomamasrosha|fomamasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fomamasmusha|fomamasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fomamasyasha|fomamasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofomamasnkshÃḋsha|gofomamasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofomamasnkrosha|gofomamasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofomamasnkmusha|gofomamasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofomamasnkyasha|gofomamasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:femÃḊsasha|femÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:femÃḊshÃḋsha|femÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:femÃḊsrosha|femÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:femÃḊsmusha|femÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:femÃḊsyasha|femÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofemÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gofemÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofemÃḊsnkrosha|gofemÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofemÃḊsnkmusha|gofemÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofemÃḊsnkyasha|gofemÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fomfasasha|fomfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fomfashÃḋsha|fomfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fomfasrosha|fomfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fomfasmusha|fomfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fomfasyasha|fomfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofomfasnkshÃḋsha|gofomfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofomfasnkrosha|gofomfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofomfasnkmusha|gofomfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofomfasnkyasha|gofomfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
